ShaderNodePreset.Description: Procedural bokeh generator by Bayley (BB). No input required — connect a background for compositing. Generates cinematic lens bokeh with full shape control (polygon sides, rotation, aspect, edge softness, hollow, rim brightness), color and brightness variation, optical effects (chromatic aberration, diffraction spikes with blur and length control, lens blur), depth layering (near/far with parallax drift), spatial distribution, and time-driven animation (drift, flicker, fade). Blend Mode controls how bokeh composites over the background (Add, Screen, Normal, Multiply, Overlay). Animate Time Offset to drive all motion. GLSL 120 compatible. Multipass: Pass 1 renders bokeh, Pass 2 applies lens blur.
ShaderNodePreset.Name: BB_BokehGenerator

Uniform.Tooltip: Background image. Leave unconnected for black.
Uniform.Name: bg_input

Uniform.Tooltip: Total number of bokeh discs. Split evenly between near and far layers.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_count

Uniform.Tooltip: Random seed. Change to get a different arrangement.
Uniform.Name: rand_seed

Uniform.Tooltip: Base size of bokeh discs in pixels.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_size

Uniform.Tooltip: How much size varies between bokeh.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_size_var

Uniform.Tooltip: Red channel of bokeh color.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_r

Uniform.Tooltip: Green channel of bokeh color.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_g

Uniform.Tooltip: Blue channel of bokeh color.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_b

Uniform.Tooltip: Hue and saturation variation per bokeh.
Uniform.Name: color_var

Uniform.Tooltip: Base brightness multiplier.
Uniform.Name: brightness

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-bokeh brightness randomness.
Uniform.Name: brightness_var

Uniform.Tooltip: Master opacity for the entire effect.
Uniform.Name: global_opacity

Uniform.Tooltip: Mix between background and full bokeh render.
Uniform.Name: mix_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: How bokeh is blended over the background.
Uniform.Name: blend_mode

Uniform.Tooltip: Number of polygon sides. 0=circle, 3=triangle, 6=hexagon, etc.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_sides

Uniform.Tooltip: Base rotation angle in degrees.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_rotation

Uniform.Tooltip: Per-bokeh rotation randomness. 0=all same angle, 1=fully random.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_rotation_var

Uniform.Tooltip: Aspect ratio of each bokeh shape.
Uniform.Name: bokeh_aspect

Uniform.Tooltip: 0=hard aperture edge, 1=very soft glowing falloff.
Uniform.Name: edge_softness

Uniform.Tooltip: 0=filled disc, 1=outline ring only.
Uniform.Name: hollow_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Extra brightness on the outer ring.
Uniform.Name: rim_brightness

Uniform.Tooltip: RGB fringing on bokeh edges.
Uniform.Name: chroma_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: Intensity of diffraction spikes.
Uniform.Name: diff_spikes

Uniform.Tooltip: Number of diffraction spikes. Usually matches Sides.
Uniform.Name: spike_count

Uniform.Tooltip: Softness of spike edges. 0=razor sharp, 1=wide feathered glow.
Uniform.Name: spike_blur

Uniform.Tooltip: Length of diffraction spikes as a multiplier of bokeh size.
Uniform.Name: spike_length

Uniform.Tooltip: Size multiplier for the near bokeh layer.
Uniform.Name: near_scale

Uniform.Tooltip: Opacity of the near bokeh layer.
Uniform.Name: near_opacity

Uniform.Tooltip: Opacity of the far bokeh layer.
Uniform.Name: far_opacity

Uniform.Tooltip: 0=uniform. Positive=more toward edges. Negative=more toward center.
Uniform.Name: density_falloff

Uniform.Tooltip: X center point for Density Falloff distribution. Only active when Density Falloff is non-zero.
Uniform.Name: dist_cx

Uniform.Tooltip: Y center point for Density Falloff distribution. Only active when Density Falloff is non-zero.
Uniform.Name: dist_cy

Uniform.Tooltip: Drives all time-based effects. Keyframe or connect to frame number.
Uniform.Name: time_offset

Uniform.Tooltip: Horizontal drift speed. Near layer drifts faster than far.
Uniform.Name: drift_x

Uniform.Tooltip: Vertical drift speed. Near layer drifts faster than far.
Uniform.Name: drift_y

Uniform.Tooltip: Brightness flicker intensity. Animate Time Offset to activate.
Uniform.Name: flicker_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: How much bokeh fade in and out over time. Animate Time Offset to activate.
Uniform.Name: fade_amount

Uniform.Tooltip: How much each bokeh varies in its fade speed.
Uniform.Name: fade_variation

Uniform.Tooltip: Final lens blur applied to the entire output. 0=off, higher=more blur.
Uniform.Name: lens_blur
